headline: Personal Protective Equipment Market to Reach USD 34.22 Billion by 2031 | 3M, DuPont, Ansell, MSA, and 37 Key Players Profiled | Arizton
summary: According to recent research by Arizton, the global personal protective equipment (PPE) market is expected to reach USD 34.22 billion by 2031, growing at a CAGR of 6.54% during the forecast period.

headline: DuPont to Unveil New Tyvek® Innovation at Safe@Work 2026 in Thailand
summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced that it will unveil a new innovation within its trusted Tyvek® portfolio at Thailand Safe@Work 2026, taking place on June 24 in Bangkok, Thailand.
